thesis:
Red Index, Green Internals — April 21, 2026
Yesterday $QQQ was red. But underneath, the tape was telling a different story. Components did well. Equal weight semis $XSD stood out. $BTC keeps riding the trend higher. $VIX and credit spreads still risk on.
What we saw was rotation. Money moving out of megacaps and into smaller cap tech. That's healthy. When the index is red but the breadth is green, you're watching a market that's rotating, not rolling over.
Still extended though. $QQQ remains over 3 ATR from the 21EMA. That hasn't changed. So any new positions need context. Smaller size. Faster derisking. Take what the tape gives you and tighten up quickly so you're not overexposed when the pullback finally comes.
The internals are doing the right things. The extension is the only thing keeping me from pressing. When those two resolve, that's when size goes on.
gameplan: Be patient with my cores, selectively add to positions on weakness - Derisk and trim more into extensions.
